title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 66.
content:
There was an Old Man of Dundee,
    Who frequented the top of a tree;
    When disturbed by the crows,
    He abruptly arose,
    And exclaimed, "I'll return to Dundee."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 66."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
